allow: Bash(node -e "import\('puppeteer'\).then\(m => console.log\('puppeteer ok:', m.default.version ? m.default.version\(\) : 'loaded'\)\).catch\(e => console.error\(e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "import\('./src/services/puppeteer.js'\).then\(m => m.captureWebsite\('https://example.com'\)\).then\(r => console.log\('ok, screenshot size:', r.data.length, 'meta:', JSON.stringify\(r.meta\)\)\).catch\(e => console.error\('fail:', e.message\)\)")
